This project uses the free tier of runners provided by GitHub.

https://docs.github.com/en/actions/how-tos/write-workflows/choose-where-workflows-run/choose-the-runner-for-a-job#standard-github-hosted-runners-for-public-repositories

More background on the images:
https://github.com/actions/runner-images/tree/main?tab=readme-ov-file#available-images
